summary: Tested broker endpoints and Brokers tab UI. All 22 backend tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with 10 broker cards, colored accent strips, status/risk badges, and Test Connection modal working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - brokers are statically defined in registry
context_for_next_testing_agent: Broker endpoints fully tested. 10 brokers total: Alpaca, IBKR, TD Ameritrade, Tradier, Robinhood, TradeStation, Thinkorswim, Webull, Wealthsimple, Fidelity. 9 have supported=True with live adapters that make real API calls, Fidelity has supported=False. Test connection validation pipeline: required_fields -> format_validation -> adapter_available (if no adapter) -> live_connection -> account_access.

tested_scenarios: Alpaca valid format -> passes format, fails live_connection (fake creds)
IBKR valid format -> passes format checks
Fidelity valid creds -> passes format, fails live_connection (no public API)

status_badges.Coming Soon: 1 broker (Fidelity - gray badge with lock icon)

test_connection_modal.result_format: PASS/FAIL status per check with message

mocked_api_note: Broker APIs are REAL - adapters make actual HTTP calls to broker endpoints. Tests with fake credentials correctly fail at live_connection step.
